name: CPG hybrid — fitness v8 (distance threshold gate)
changes_from_exp007: Added MIN_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD=1.5m gate: if cumulative_distance < 1.5m, fitness=0.0 regardless of all other components
Removed all v6/v7 complexity: sym_contact_penalty, stagnation_penalty, motion-gating — back to clean simple fitness
Kept W_ALTERNATION=5.0 and MIN_SPEED=0.5 from v6/v7
Fresh start from exp003 (pre-hopping strider) — escape the one-step attractor entirely

fitness_function.formula: (cumulative_distance < 1.5m) ? 0.0 : cumulative_distance*30 + upright*0.2 + speed_bonus*1.0 + alternation_bonus*5.0 + time_alive*0.05 - pitch_rate*0.05 - joint_penalty*0.01 - impact_penalty*0.005 - fall_penalty*200

rationale.exp007_diagnosis: Stagnation penalty failed — creature wobbles slightly in place, intermittently triggering x_vel > 0.2 m/s and resetting the stagnation counter. All warm-starts from exp006/exp007 trapped in the same one-step basin.
rationale.threshold_gate: Makes partial solutions (one step, fall immediately, stand still) score exactly 0.0 — identical to doing nothing. CMA-ES gets no gradient from these, is forced to find solutions that actually locomote 1.5m+.
rationale.fresh_from_exp003: exp003 produced a striding gait before falling (not a standing exploit). Warm-starting from it avoids the one-step attractor entirely.
rationale.simplification: Removed sym_contact, stagnation, motion-gating — they added complexity without solving the core problem. The gate is the only anti-exploit mechanism needed.
